message:
fix(channel): allow MPSC channel slot reuse after FULLY_CLOSED

Previously, MPSC channel slots were never freed — once both sender and
receiver were closed, the slot stayed alive=1 with state=FULLY_CLOSED
permanently. After ASX_MAX_CHANNELS creates, no more channels could
be created even if all previous ones were fully closed.

Fix: asx_channel_create now considers slots in FULLY_CLOSED state as
reusable (alongside alive=0 slots). The generation counter (already
fixed in a prior commit) ensures stale handles from the old channel
are rejected. Existing state queries on FULLY_CLOSED channels continue
to work since alive remains 1 until the slot is recycled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
